name: Use of a One-Way Hash without a Salt
description: The product uses a one-way cryptographic hash for sensitive data such as passwords without incorporating a salt, making it vulnerable to dictionary attacks and rainbow table lookups against the hashed values.
detection_pattern: INGRESS(password_input) flows to TRANSFORM(hash_function) which writes to STORAGE(credential_store), but TRANSFORM(hash_function) does not incorporate a TRANSFORM(salt_generation) input. Look for hashing operations on sensitive data with no salt parameter.
